title: Peanut Korean BBQ Beef
description: A sweet and savory Korean-inspired BBQ dish made with beef and a crunchy peanut crust.

ingredients.name: Savory peanut butter
ingredients.notes: Creamy peanut butter with a savory twist

instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together peanut butter, chili flakes, brown sugar, soy sauce, rice vinegar, and ginger.
Add the sliced flank steak to the marinade and mix to coat.
Let the steak marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Remove the steak from the marinade and grill for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired doneness.
Transfer the steak to a cutting board and let rest for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, toast the peanuts in a small skillet over medium heat, stirring frequently, until fragrant and lightly browned.
Slice the rested steak against the grain into thin strips.
Serve the steak strips with a sprinkle of toasted peanuts, green onions, and sesame seeds.
Drizzle with additional peanut butter sauce, if desired.
